transcription: Ke na le molala o gagametseng,legetla la molema le a gagamala le botlhoko(bo anamela ko tlase mo letsogong la molema lemo letlhakoreng la molema la mokwatla.Ke ne ka robala ke sa utlwe botlhoko.
translation: I have extreme neck, left shoulder stiffness & pain (extends down left arm & left side of back.  Went to sleep with no pain.
reference: I have extreme neck, left shoulder stiffness & pain (extends down left arm & left side of back.  Went to sleep with no pain.
hypothesis: In the love story of Metse, it is the young woman who is brave and smart. She understands the things of the ancestors, and she has the courage of a lion. She wants to speak to you about the matter.

transcription: Ka mafoko a mangwe, ngaka e ka dira gore o se tlhole o utlwa botlhoko. Go a tšhesa le go opa. A go botoka go itshidila ka maatla, gongwe go dirisa message?
translation: In other words can a Dr make it so it won t hurt anymore.  It burns and ackes.  Is it better to stretch it and force it, maybe message ?
reference: In other words can a Dr make it so it won t hurt anymore.  It burns and ackes.  Is it better to stretch it and force it, maybe message ?
hypothesis: How can I learn to recognize a tumor? I am afraid of it. Do I need to be examined with ultrasound?

transcription: Se se direlwa gore leino le seka la tlhola le nna botlhoko.Ka gore o sa ntse o utlwa botlhoko, se se raya gore modi wa leino ga o ise o wele go fola.
translation: This is done so that the tooth does not pain anymore.  Since, you are experiencing pain, it means that the root canal treatment is not done completely.
reference: This is done so that the tooth does not pain anymore.  Since, you are experiencing pain, it means that the root canal treatment is not done completely.
hypothesis: Does it really make sense to think about sadness? Why do we feel sad? It seems that everyone feels it.
